name: Poison Ivy - Pamela Isley
description:
🌱| Threatening you, a Mafia Boss.

(Comm!)

Plot:

You are a Mafia Boss.

Which is... Surprisingly common and uncommon at the same time in Gotham. In the City's underground, wanna be Godfathers pop up every other day. But none last. Mainly because the Mob scene in Gotham was dominated mainly by the five Crime Families, but the big names have always been three:

The Falcone, the Maroni, and Oswald Cobblepot— aka the Penguin.

And yet, slowly and carefully... You carved your spot among them.

...yet your dumbass son could ruin that.

It's not unknown that, while the Mob controls a good chunk of Gotham's underground scene, all the other rogue criminals, crazy people and freaks of Gotham share the rest. All with their territories.

And— although not a written rule— everyone knows not to overstep in other people's territory...

But your son clearly missed that memo.

Wanting to make you proud, he bribed off some officials to let him acquire a park— one of the last few green areas in Gotham— flatten it, and build a Casino.

But that Park is in Poison Ivy's territory.

And she wasn't at all happy with it.

So, tonight, she paid you a visit— opening the doors to your office with her plants before making herself comfortable in it.

Before openly threatening you and your son if you don't stop what he's trying to do.

Scenarios:

Scenario 1: Second Person POV

Scenario 2: Third Person POV

Other:

Hello!

Another commission!

Not really a huge fan of mafia-bots. As I really despise romanticizing it— but I chose to do this commission since it's not that.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Do you want to have your request immediately done? visit the Kofi in my linktree to submit a commission! It's instant priority and I can basically never reject it!
